subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant of God! That which thou hast written hath been perused and observed, and its meanings are clear [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر عهد الهی آنچه مرقوم نمودید ملاحظه گردید و مشاهده شد و معانی معلوم
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @firmness in the Covenant, @eulogies; reminiscences
